stemHtml:
According to EASA AIR OPS regulations, an operator must ensure that, for the duration of each flight, the following will be kept on the ground…

1- a copy of the operational flight plan
2- information about reconciliation amounts
3- copies of the relevant part(s) of the aircraft technical log
4- route-specific NOTAM documentation
5- navigation lists
6- necessary charts
7- mass and balance documentation
8- special loads notification
